description_long: This is a large, throne-like recliner constructed primarily from metallic materials, featuring a high, angular backrest with a prominent Superman emblem engraved at the top. The seat is broad and flat, flanked by sturdy, rectangular armrests that are integrated into the overall geometric design. The base is wide and extends outward in a star-like pattern, with visible bolts and textured metal plating, suggesting industrial strength and stability. The rear of the backrest is plain, while the front lower section displays the 'WAYNE ENTERPRISES' logo, indicating a connection to the Batman universe. The color palette is dominated by shades of gray and silver, with some black and subtle copper accents on the bolts. The overall appearance is imposing and utilitarian, blending superhero iconography with robust, urban-industrial aesthetics.
description: A large, metallic throne-style recliner with a high backrest featuring a Superman emblem and 'WAYNE ENTERPRISES' logo, set on a wide, star-shaped industrial base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Superman emblem, broad seat, armrests, and the star-shaped base with visible bolts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the layered construction of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'WAYNE ENTERPRISES' logo and the plain back of the high backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the solid, blocky profile and base structure.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rectangular, and integrated into the main structure, made of the same metallic material as the rest of the chair, with no visible padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single, continuous piece extending from the seat to the top, with no visible segmentation for headrest or lumbar support.
